test-case.name: GetLevel_ReturnsNull_ForInvalidLevel
test-case.output: Invalid card level: 0. Must be between 1 and 13. Invalid card level: 14. Must be between 1 and 13.

test-case.name: ArenaConfig_GetArenaByTrophies_HandlesNegative
test-case.output: [ArenaConfig] No arena found for trophies: -1, returning default TrainingCamp

test-case.name: BattleDrawGold_IsBetweenLoseAndWin
test-case.output: EconomyBalanceSO not found in Resources/Config/, using defaults!
